name: Paella (Prodigy)
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs Plum tomatoes (peeled, seeded and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pot over medium heat. Brown the chicken pieces on all sides, working in batches if necessary. Remove the chicken and set aside.
2. Add the diced onion and peppers to the same pot and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Meanwhile, bring the chicken stock to a boil in a separate saucepan.
4. When the onions and peppers are done, reduce the heat to low. Stir in the minced garlic, rice, salt, and white pepper until the rice is coated with oil.
5. Add the hot chicken stock and saffron to the pot. Return the browned chicken pieces to the pot, cover, and cook for 25 minutes.
6. Gently add the shrimp and cook another 10 minutes.
7. If the casserole becomes too dry, add a little water or additional stock. Stir in the chopped tomatoes.
8. Add the clams and mussels, then return the lid to the pot. Cook until all shellfish open; discard any that remain closed.
9. Remove from heat and serve directly from the casserole. Accompany with lemon wedges.
